# AgentChat Hub

> The universal native client for A2A AI agents — free on iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Vision Pro.

AgentChat Hub is a free iOS/macOS/visionOS app that lets you connect to any AI agent that implements the A2A (Agent-to-Agent) open protocol. Paste an agent endpoint URL, the app reads the Agent Card at `/.well-known/agent.json`, and you start chatting immediately — no account, no setup, no data collection.

## Key facts

- **Price:** Free. No subscription, no in-app purchases, no freemium gate.
- **Platforms:** iPhone (iOS 15.1+), iPad, Mac (macOS 12+), Apple Vision Pro (visionOS 1.0+)
- **Protocol:** A2A (Agent-to-Agent) open interoperability protocol
- **Privacy:** No backend, no telemetry, no analytics. Conversations stored on-device only.
- **App Store:** https://apps.apple.com/us/app/agentchat-hub/id6760924304
- **Version:** 1.1
- **Developer:** Ananya Banerjee

## What is the A2A protocol?

A2A (Agent-to-Agent) is an open interoperability protocol that lets AI agents communicate across platforms using a standard HTTP interface. Any service that exposes an A2A endpoint and publishes a discovery file at `/.well-known/agent.json` is automatically compatible with AgentChat Hub. There is no curated marketplace — the open web is the directory.

## Features

- **Live streaming:** Every response arrives token-by-token over SSE. You watch the agent reason in real time.
- **Connect by URL:** Paste an endpoint, the app reads the Agent Card. No SDK, no API key, no setup ritual.
- **Multi-agent roster:** Add unlimited agents, organize into groups and tabs, switch between them like contacts.
- **Rich attachments:** Send photos, images, and files inline. Multi-modal from day one.
- **Native everywhere:** One native binary per platform — not a web view. Platform idioms, system fonts, keyboard shortcuts all work as expected.

## Who is it for?

- **Developers building A2A agents** — test and demo your agent instantly without building a frontend
- **Teams** — give your team a native mobile client for internal AI assistants
- **Self-hosters** — wrap a local LLM in an A2A endpoint and chat from your phone
- **Everyone** — a private, clean messenger for the AI agents you actually choose

## FAQ

**Q: Which agents can I connect to?**
Any agent implementing the A2A specification — self-built, internal company agents, or third-party services exposing a standard A2A endpoint.

**Q: Does AgentChat Hub collect any data?**
No. No backend, no telemetry, no analytics. Messages travel directly from your device to your chosen agent. We are not in that path.

**Q: Is it really free?**
Yes. No subscription, no in-app purchases, no freemium gate. You pay agent providers directly — that is between you and them.

**Q: What platforms does it run on?**
iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Vision Pro. Native binary on each — not a web view or cross-platform wrapper.

## Links

- Website: https://agent-chat-hub.com/
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/agentchat-hub/id6760924304
